metadata.title: nl-fast-image-cleaner
metadata.description: This plugin allows you to quickly remove image attachment and referenced link from your documents in both LIVE , READ mode by right-click menu

regex.source: Notice(` cannot get the image file`)
regex.target: Notice(` 无法获取图像文件`)

text: "remove link"
text: "Detected that the image you are attempting to delete is being referenced multiple times within the current document. \n As a result. We kindly ask that you manually remove the link."
regex.target: text: "检测到您尝试删除的图像在当前文档中被多次引用。 \因此，我们请求您手动删除链接"

regex.source: text: "Delete the file and its all attachments - logs "
regex.target: text: "删除附件及所有附件 - 日志 "

text: "Confirm"

.addOption("permanent", "Delete Permanently");

const otherMdsLog = "List of all documents that reference this attachment: \n" + otherMds;
